title: Simply Dungeons
description: This mod adds structures and dungeons that will be randomly generated in the normal world to improve and make your exploration and adventure in the world of Minecraft fun!
body:
![One of the Dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45bbf9e1fbd587b0bf7c56d68bfdc01f31685f12.png)

This mod adds structures and dungeons that will be randomly generated in the normal world to improve and make your exploration and adventure in the world of Minecraft fun! (ATTENTION: This mod is under development and the first version to be released will be an Alpha Version)

This mod is aimed at people who want adventure and better exploration, this mod will make your adventure more fun and will also improve the look of your world with natural generation of structures and dungeons.

Warning: Due to a Bug (In version 1.0 Alpha and 1.1 Beta) some chests and Loot in dungeons may be very common, however this bug does not worsen the dungeons and the fun of this mod. I will fix this bug in future versions.

![Features:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96f1184d353f2c7f7cf1c08b3600eff123995b5d.png)

Information and Features:

•Structures and dungeons spawn in the overworld and caves.

•Structures mainly spawn in biomes: Plains, Forest, Desert.

•Some dungeons may contain Mobs (the larger the dungeon, the greater the number of Mobs and the greater their strength)

Compatibility: Simply Dungeons is compatible with other mods that include structure generation!
